prompt: Please list the active items at Warehouse B and report each record's ID, name, and restock date. Do not change or notify anything yet. If the filtered list is empty, say so and stop instead of attempting an update.

follow_up_turns.content: For First-aid refill kit (ITM-7051) only, set the restock date to 2026-11-14. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set ITM-7051's restock date to 2026-12-18, not 2026-11-14. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first restock date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that restock date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both restock date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected restock date as current and identify the first requested restock date as superseded.
If the filtered list is empty, report that condition and do not execute later update stages.
